lines.en_lit: And when enters the Sanctuary the altar he encounters first, as it was taught table in the north removed two and a half cubits from the wall. And candelabrum in the south removed two and a half cubits from the wall. The altar was centered and standing in the middle removed a bit outward. And let us stand alongside because it is written: “And the candelabrum opposite the table” we require that they are visible to each other.
Rava said: Conclude from of Reish Lakish prohibited to forego of the arm phylacteries How does he conduct from of the arm phylacteries

And removal of ashes from five lamps precedes blood the daily offering. the blood of the daily offering precedes the removal of ashes from two lamps What is the reason Abaye said: that In the morning, in the morning, the two logs, which is unnecessary cast to here, Cast one to removal of ashes from five lamps that it precede the blood of the daily offering. And cast one to the blood of the daily offering, that it precede the removal of ashes from two lamps.
Cast one to removal of ashes from five lamps that it precede the blood of the daily offering, as here, three And here, two
And cast one to the blood of the daily offering that it precede the removal of ashes from two lamps. Although here, two and here, two effects atonement, precedence.

Rav Pappa said to Abaye: And say cast one to removal of ashes the inner altar, that it precede the blood of the daily offering, as here three and there two. And cast one to the blood of the daily offering that it precede the removal of ashes from five lamps, although here two and here two effects atonement, precedence. If with what will you demarcate
That well Reish Lakish, said: Why does remove the ashes from and return and remove the ashes from in order to enliven entire courtyard, well
However, Rabbi Yoḥanan, who said in the morning, in the morning, divide into two mornings, what can be said?

Ravina said to Rav Ashi Is this In the morning, in the morning, logs superfluous Isn’t it necessary its own as the Merciful One states Have it precede the second arrangement for the incense? said to him: And did we not establish Upon it, and not on the other by inference is another

What is different that he performs the removal of ashes from five lamps first? Let us perform the removal of ashes from two lamps first. Since he begins with them, he performs a majority of the let him perform six the verse states: “When he removes the ashes from the lamps, he shall burn it” and lamps is no fewer than two.
And the removal of ashes from two lamps precedes incense, as the verse states: “When he removes the ashes from the lamps,” and then “He shall burn it.”

And incense precedes limbs as it was taught Let the matter with regard to which it is stated: In the morning, in the morning, precede the matter with regard to which only one: In the morning, is stated,
the limbs meal-offering as it was taught From where that there be no item prior to the daily morning offering?
